# GitHub Topics

Add these topics to your GitHub repository for better discoverability:

## Primary Topics
- `dnd`
- `dungeons-dragons`
- `5e`
- `dnd-5e`
- `rpg`
- `tabletop`

## Technical Topics
- `python`
- `python3`
- `game-engine`
- `game-development`

## Feature Topics
- `character-sheet`
- `combat-engine`
- `spells`
- `monsters`
- `rpg-tools`

## Category Topics
- `role-playing-game`
- `tabletop-rpg`
- `dungeons-and-dragons`

---

## How to Add Topics on GitHub

1. Go to your repository: https://github.com/codingame-team/dnd-5e-core
2. Click the ⚙️ gear icon next to "About" in the sidebar
3. In the "Topics" field, add the topics above (separated by spaces)
4. Click "Save changes"

**Recommended Topics (up to 20)**:
```
dnd dungeons-dragons 5e dnd-5e rpg tabletop python game-engine character-sheet combat-engine spells monsters rpg-tools role-playing-game tabletop-rpg game-development python3
```
